name: read_edif
short_description: Read one or more EDIF or NGC files
full_help:
read_edif

Description: 
Read one or more EDIF or NGC files

Syntax: 
read_edif  [-quiet] [-verbose] <files>

Returns: 
list of file objects that were added

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  <files>     EDIF or NGC file name(s)

Categories: 
FileIO

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
